themes.exampleQuote: Their cakes are awesome — if you are a fan of not overly sweet cakes, this place is a must try.
The matcha latte was rich and creamy and sweet — the best matcha I've had in a long time.
Tons of wall plugs and comfortable seating, making it a great spot to get some work done.
Can get crowded and a bit loud at times, but that's a testament to how much people love this place!
Sometimes my ice cream size varies too much — especially when it's like $8 I expect a decent portion.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers rave about Kyo Matcha's not-too-sweet Japanese cakes, rich matcha drinks, and cozy work-friendly atmosphere, while nitpicking inconsistent ice cream portions, limited parking, and at least one instance of closing before the posted time.
notable_quote: Pittsburgh needs more cozy coffee shops with this sort of vibe!
